category_sources: Official Apache Xerces-C++ overview describes a validating XML parser and XML library.
source_facts.description says it is a validating XML parser.
display_name_sources: Official Apache page title and navigation use Xerces-C++.
docs_sources: Official Apache Xerces-C++ overview, programming guide, and API reference.
repo_sources: Official Apache Source Repository page states Xerces-C++ source is stored in the Apache Git repository and gives the gitbox clone URL.
tags_sources: Official Apache overview lists DOM, SAX, SAX2 APIs and validation features.
